name: Insta360 Camera
description: Control Insta360 cameras via OSC protocol

cameraHost.label: Camera Host
cameraHost.help: Camera OSC API address. Default works when connected to camera WiFi.

lowBatteryThreshold.label: Low Battery Alert (%)
lowBatteryThreshold.help: Alert when battery drops below this percentage during recording.

lowStorageMB.label: Low Storage Alert (MB)
lowStorageMB.help: Alert when free storage drops below this value during recording.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: Status polling interval during recording. Minimum 5000ms.
